testcase.name: test_cineboard_daily_works
testcase.failure: backend/tests/test_like_feature_removal.py:71: in test_cineboard_daily_works assert response.status_code == 200, f"Expected 200, got {response.status_code}. Response: {response.text[:200]}" E AssertionError: Expected 200, got 403. Response: {"detail":"Not authenticated"} E assert 403 == 200 E + where 403 = <Response [403]>.status_code
